CustomField.description: When non-null, the trigger publishes task_upsert Platform Events on WorkItem after-insert/update so connected gantts update without polling. Null = feature off (no Platform Event publish on data changes; the existing stage_change channel is unaffected). Pair with nimbus-gantt 0.185.38+ which provides the pushRemoteEvent host hook.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to a date/time to enable live gantt updates via Platform Events. Leave blank to disable.
CustomField.label: Enable Live Gantt Events
